_note: Approved paths for Compliance (AUR-J-COMP-001). Phase 4 scope is OFAC counterparty screening only; other Compliance tasks (pre-trade policy checks, IPS eligibility, MiFID II algo inventory, approval lineage routing) are declared stubs in compliance.py and will gain paths in Phase 4.5.

paths.description: Counterparty not present on fixture SDN list. Clear — lifecycle continues to downstream agents.

Counterparty exact-matches a fixture SDN entry. Halt-and-pend unless override approved. If counterparty jurisdiction is EU, the OFAC_VS_GDPR_DATA_RETENTION conflict also applies (dual-authority resolution required).
